name: neo4j-spring-data-skill
description: Use when building Spring Boot applications with Neo4j using Spring Data Neo4j (SDN): @Node entity mapping, @Relationship, Neo4jRepository, ReactiveNeo4jRepository, @Query annotations, application.yml configuration, projections, or Neo4j-OGM. Also covers Spring AI Neo4jVectorStore integration. Does NOT handle raw Java driver code (no Spring) — use neo4j-driver-java-skill. Does NOT handle Cypher query authoring — use neo4j-cypher-skill. Does NOT handle driver version upgrades — use neo4j-migration-skill.
